categories.name: Easy plants to grow in a balcony garden
Kitchen scraps to use in the garden

fun_fact: Growing even a small balcony or terrace garden can reduce kitchen waste through composting, cool your home naturally and give you the unparalleled joy of growing your own food! [Read one gardener's story](https://sunnyclimatestormyclimate.substack.com/p/growing-a-terrace-garden-a-photo)
